description: An agent must create a decision tree to help a client decide whether to launch a new product.

nodes.task_description: Identify the key decision ('Launch' vs. 'Don't Launch') and the key uncertainties ('High Demand' vs. 'Low Demand') with their probabilities.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly structures the initial nodes of the decision tree.

nodes.task_description: Assign financial outcomes (payoffs) to each final branch of the tree.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly assigns the payoff values.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the Expected Monetary Value (EMV) for the 'Launch' decision.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly calculates the EMV to help make the optimal decision.
